title: Bridge Essay: On the minimal theory of consciousness implicit in active inference.

body.text: Bridge paper: Dependent-arising meets predictive processing.

**On the minimal theory of consciousness implicit in active inference.** — Physics of life reviews (). PMID: 41289944. Score: 17. The multifaceted nature of subjective experience poses achallenge to the study of consciousness. Traditional neuroscientific approaches often concentrate on isolated facets, such as perceptual awareness or the global state of consciousness and construct atheory around the relevant empirical paradigms and findings.
